title: GeneratedArtifact
description: Tracks a single file produced by DTFS codegen. Links the file back to the contract that produced it, records content hash for drift detection, and flags protected files. Design doc source: docs/GENERATED_ARTIFACTS.md.

runtimeTargetId.description: FK to RuntimeTarget that was active when this artifact was generated

backendContractId.description: FK to BackendContract (for HONO_ROUTE, BETTER_AUTH, PRISMA_SCHEMA, etc.)

frontendContractId.description: FK to FrontendContract (for NEXT_PAGE, NEXT_COMPONENT, NEXT_LAYOUT)

sharedContractId.description: FK to SharedContract (for SHARED_TYPE, SHARED_SCHEMA, SDK_CLIENT, etc.)

changeSetId.description: FK to the ChangeSet that triggered this codegen run

path.description: Relative path within the generated output directory

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file content (UTF-8). Used for drift detection.

protected.description: If true, codegen will not overwrite this file on re-run

generatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last codegen run that wrote this file
